title: Cirrus: Expand netavark testing to include rootless
body:
The list of netavark/aardvark-dns tasks is likely to be
ever-growing for the near-term.  Consolidate them into a single task
entry with a matrix attribute to make future expansions less
YAML-duplicative.  Also, re-arrange it to fall in-between the CNI
integration and system task sections.

***Note***: As discussed, before any further additions of netavark-related testing tasks, a big-picture discussion is needed.  We cannot willy-nilly double the testing matrix (i.e. CNI + Netavark) without dire maintenance and flake related consequences.
